text.title: swap-memory-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for swap-memory-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: With swappiness=0 the kernel will never use swap and will OOM-kill processes instead. A value of 10 keeps the safety valve open.
